reasons: A bundled repo-surface-project model now normalizes terminology across Agents, Work, Projects, and Repos without adding any execution or write power.
Customer portal now renders as a surface under jai-nexus/jai-nexus, and the five-key agent matrix now renders truthfully as a configured scope subset rather than as the full repo universe.
Draft work packets and task prompt previews now target actual repo-plus-surface destinations, with optional project overlays and unchanged execution guardrails.
Projects now render as workstreams spanning repos and surfaces, while /repos now presents the full repo registry and explains the difference from configured agent scope subset keys.
Required gates passed, no API or DB mutation was added, no runtime or proof files changed, and no existing motion packages were modified.
No execution, branch write, PR creation, dispatch, scheduler, or cross-repo mutation capability was introduced.
